options.name: -clock
options.description: List or collection of clocks for which reachability is desired.

options.name: -max_paths
options.description: Specifies to report number of maximum clock paths per clock

options.name: -verbose
options.description: Generates a verbose report for clock propagation stop reason

options.name: -view
options.description: Generates a report for specified analysis view (string, optional) > <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to specified file (redirect_operator, optional) >> <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to specified file
